_doc: Phase 5 Plan 05-06 — Phase 3 user_moved_on regression canary. The model emits ask_user; the user's next utterance overtakes the ask with unrelated content (a brand-new reading rather than answering the question). The Phase 3 dispatcher resolves with answer_outcome='user_moved_on' (a real-fire reason — the budget MUST still increment per stage6-ask-gate-wrapper.js:WRAPPER_SHORT_CIRCUIT_REASONS). Plan 05-06 verifies that the gated path PRESERVES this Phase 3 behaviour — the wrapper does NOT swallow user_moved_on into 'gated' or 'session_terminated'. Per Plan 05-06 design: gate_fixture:true — 0 successful 'answered' asks (user_moved_on is not 'answered') so the fixture contributes 0 to the median.
_requirement: STB-05 — no existing guard weakened: Phase 3's user_moved_on lifecycle must survive composition with the Phase 5 gates. Pitfall 4 carry-over: a real-fire (non-wrapper-short-circuit) outcome consumes a budget slot.
transcript_summary: Model asks 'which circuit was Ze for?' on turn 2; user's turn-3 utterance is unrelated ('R1+R2 on circuit 4 is point one one'). Ask resolves with user_moved_on.
